# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: meshConfig-defaultOutboundTrafficAllowedAnyServiceEntryDefinitionsOnlyMicroservicesIntegrateWithExternalAPIsAndAllowMaxFlexibilityForServicesToCallExternallyWithoutDefinitionApprovalByDefaultsSetAsALLOW_ANYModeOfoutboundtraffictopology
spec: {}  # All fields are omitted for brevity, full specification is described in the Istio documentation. Please refer to that resource details regarding all configuration options available here : https://istio.io/latest/docs/reference/config/networking/destination-rule/#DestinationRule
